content.json:
# 🔐 Azure Disk Encryption → Encryption at Host Migration Tracker

**Azure Disk Encryption (ADE) will be retired on September 15, 2028.**
After that date, ADE-encrypted disks will fail to unlock after VM reboots.

This workbook helps you identify:
- Which VMs use ADE (extension-based encryption) and need migration
- Which VMs already use Encryption at Host
- Disk-level encryption details (PMK, CMK, ADE)
- **Disks with residual `encryptionSettingsCollection` flag** that block Encryption at Host (even after ADE removal)

> 💡 **Recommended action:** Migrate from ADE to [Encryption at Host](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-machines/disk-encryption-overview#encryption-at-host). No in-place migration is available — VMs and disks must be recreated.

> ⚠️ **Important:** Removing the ADE extension does NOT clear the disk-level `encryptionSettingsCollection` flag. Disks with this flag **cannot** have Encryption at Host enabled. The disk must be recreated via VHD Upload. See the **🚫 Blocked** tab.

---

parameters.name: ResourceGroups
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| summarize by resourceGroup
| order by resourceGroup asc
| project value = resourceGroup, label = resourceGroup

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| extend vmId = tolower(id)
| extend encryptionAtHost = tobool(properties.securityProfile.encryptionAtHost)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
    | extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | project vmId, adeExtension = name
) on vmId
| extend encryptionMethod = case(
    isnotempty(adeExtension) and encryptionAtHost == true, 'ADE + Host Encryption',
    isnotempty(adeExtension), 'ADE (Extension) ⚠️',
    encryptionAtHost == true, 'Encryption at Host ✅',
    'Platform Managed (SSE-PMK)'
)
| summarize Count = count() by encryptionMethod
| order by Count desc
content.title: VM Encryption Distribution

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| extend vmId = tolower(id)
| extend encryptionAtHost = tobool(properties.securityProfile.encryptionAtHost)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
    | extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | project vmId, adeExtension = name
) on vmId
| extend encryptionMethod = case(
    isnotempty(adeExtension) and encryptionAtHost == true, 'ADE + Host Encryption',
    isnotempty(adeExtension), 'ADE (Extension)',
    encryptionAtHost == true, 'Encryption at Host',
    'Platform Managed (SSE-PMK)'
)
| summarize Count = count() by encryptionMethod
| extend Status = case(
    encryptionMethod == 'ADE (Extension)', '🔴 Migration Required',
    encryptionMethod == 'ADE + Host Encryption', '🟡 Remove ADE Extension',
    encryptionMethod == 'Encryption at Host', '🟢 Compliant',
    '🔵 Default Encryption'
)
| project encryptionMethod, Count, Status
| order by Count desc
content.title: Encryption Summary Counts

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| extend vmId = tolower(id)
| extend encryptionAtHost = tobool(properties.securityProfile.encryptionAtHost)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
    | extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | project vmId, adeExtension = name
) on vmId
| extend encryptionMethod = case(
    isnotempty(adeExtension) and encryptionAtHost == true, 'ADE + Host Encryption',
    isnotempty(adeExtension), 'ADE (Extension)',
    encryptionAtHost == true, 'Encryption at Host',
    'Platform Managed (SSE-PMK)'
)
| summarize Count = count() by subscriptionId, encryptionMethod
| order by subscriptionId asc, encryptionMethod asc
content.title: Encryption Method by Subscription

content.json:
### ⚠️ VMs with Azure Disk Encryption Extension
These VMs use the **ADE extension** (`AzureDiskEncryption` or `AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux`) and **must be migrated** before September 15, 2028.

> Migration requires creating new VMs and disks — no in-place migration is available.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
| where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
| extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
| extend vmName = tostring(split(vmId, '/')[8])
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| extend extensionType = name
| extend autoUpgradeMinorVersion = tostring(properties.autoUpgradeMinorVersion)
| extend typeHandlerVersion = tostring(properties.typeHandlerVersion)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
    | extend vmId = tolower(id)
    | extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
    | extend vmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize)
    | extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
    | extend encryptionAtHost = tobool(properties.securityProfile.encryptionAtHost)
    | project vmId, osType, vmSize, powerState, encryptionAtHost, resourceGroup, subscriptionId, location
) on vmId
| extend migrationStatus = case(
    encryptionAtHost == true, '🟡 Host Encryption enabled — remove ADE extension',
    '🔴 Migration needed'
)
| project
    vmName,
    resourceGroup,
    subscriptionId,
    location,
    osType,
    vmSize,
    extensionType,
    typeHandlerVersion,
    provisioningState,
    encryptionAtHost,
    migrationStatus
| order by migrationStatus asc, vmName asc
content.title: VMs with ADE Extension — Migration Required

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
| where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
| extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
    | extend vmId = tolower(id)
    | extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
    | project vmId, osType
) on vmId
| summarize Count = count() by osType
| order by Count desc
content.title: ADE VMs by OS Type

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
| where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
| extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
    | extend vmId = tolower(id)
    | project vmId, resourceGroup
) on vmId
| summarize Count = count() by resourceGroup
| order by Count desc
| take 20
content.title: ADE VMs by Resource Group (Top 20)

content.json:
### 🖥️ All VMs — Encryption Status
Complete inventory of all virtual machines and their current encryption configuration.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| extend vmId = tolower(id)
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
| extend vmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize)
| extend encryptionAtHost = tobool(properties.securityProfile.encryptionAtHost)
| extend securityType = tostring(properties.securityProfile.securityType)
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
    | extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | project vmId, adeExtension = name
) on vmId
| extend hasADE = isnotempty(adeExtension)
| extend encryptionMethod = case(
    hasADE and encryptionAtHost == true, '🟡 ADE + Host Encryption',
    hasADE, '🔴 ADE (Extension)',
    encryptionAtHost == true, '🟢 Encryption at Host',
    securityType =~ 'ConfidentialVM', '🟢 Confidential VM',
    '🔵 Platform Managed (SSE)'
)
| project
    name,
    resourceGroup,
    subscriptionId,
    location,
    osType,
    vmSize,
    encryptionMethod,
    hasADE,
    encryptionAtHost,
    securityType,
    powerState
| order by encryptionMethod asc, name asc
content.title: All VMs — Encryption Configuration

content.json:
### 💾 Disk-Level Encryption Details
Shows encryption configuration for each managed disk, including encryption type and Disk Encryption Set (DES) association.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| extend encryptionType = tostring(properties.encryption.type)
| extend diskEncryptionSetId = tostring(properties.encryption.diskEncryptionSetId)
| extend desName = iff(isnotempty(diskEncryptionSetId), tostring(split(diskEncryptionSetId, '/')[8]), '')
| extend diskState = tostring(properties.diskState)
| extend diskSizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB)
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osType)
| extend sku = tostring(sku.name)
| extend managedBy = tostring(properties.managedBy)
| extend vmName = iff(isnotempty(managedBy), tostring(split(managedBy, '/')[8]), 'Unattached')
| extend encryptionLabel = case(
    encryptionType =~ 'EncryptionAtRestWithPlatformKey', '🔵 SSE with Platform Key',
    encryptionType =~ 'EncryptionAtRestWithCustomerKey', '🟣 SSE with Customer Key (CMK)',
    encryptionType =~ 'EncryptionAtRestWithPlatformAndCustomerKeys', '🟣 SSE with Platform + Customer Key',
    '🔵 Platform Managed'
)
| project
    name,
    resourceGroup,
    subscriptionId,
    location,
    vmName,
    osType,
    diskState,
    diskSizeGB,
    sku,
    encryptionType,
    encryptionLabel,
    desName
| order by vmName asc, name asc
content.title: Managed Disks — Encryption Configuration

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| extend encryptionType = tostring(properties.encryption.type)
| extend encryptionLabel = case(
    encryptionType =~ 'EncryptionAtRestWithPlatformKey', 'SSE Platform Key',
    encryptionType =~ 'EncryptionAtRestWithCustomerKey', 'SSE Customer Key (CMK)',
    encryptionType =~ 'EncryptionAtRestWithPlatformAndCustomerKeys', 'SSE Platform + Customer Key',
    'Platform Managed'
)
| summarize Count = count(), TotalSizeGB = sum(toint(properties.diskSizeGB)) by encryptionLabel
| order by Count desc
content.title: Disk Encryption Type Distribution

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| extend diskState = tostring(properties.diskState)
| summarize Count = count(), TotalSizeGB = sum(toint(properties.diskSizeGB)) by diskState
| order by Count desc
content.title: Disk Attachment Status

content.json:
### 🚫 Disks with ADE Residual Flag (Blocked from Encryption at Host)

Even after removing the ADE extension and decrypting disks, Azure stamps an **`encryptionSettingsCollection`** metadata flag on the disk resource. This flag **persists** and **blocks Encryption at Host** from being enabled.

> **Error you'll see:** *"Encryption at host is not allowed for a VM having disks that were encrypted with Azure Disk Encryption."*

**Resolution:** There is no way to clear this flag in-place. You must **recreate the disk** using the VHD Upload method to get a clean disk without the ADE stamp. See [Microsoft migration guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-machines/disk-encryption-migrate).

---

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| where tobool(properties.encryptionSettingsCollection.enabled) == true
| extend diskName = name
| extend diskState = tostring(properties.diskState)
| extend diskSizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB)
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osType)
| extend sku = tostring(sku.name)
| extend managedBy = tostring(properties.managedBy)
| extend vmName = iff(isnotempty(managedBy), tostring(split(managedBy, '/')[8]), 'Unattached')
| extend encryptionType = tostring(properties.encryption.type)
| extend encSettingsEnabled = tostring(properties.encryptionSettingsCollection.enabled)
| extend encSettingsVersion = tostring(properties.encryptionSettingsCollection.encryptionSettingsVersion)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
    | extend vmId = tolower(id)
    | extend encryptionAtHost = tobool(properties.securityProfile.encryptionAtHost)
    | project vmId, encryptionAtHost
) on $left.managedBy == $right.vmId
| extend hostEncryptionBlocked = iff(encSettingsEnabled == 'true', '🔴 Blocked', '🟢 Clear')
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
    | extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | project vmId, adeExtensionPresent = true
) on $left.managedBy == $right.vmId
| extend adeExtensionStillPresent = iff(isnotempty(adeExtensionPresent), '⚠️ Yes', '✅ Removed')
| project
    diskName,
    vmName,
    resourceGroup,
    subscriptionId,
    location,
    osType,
    diskState,
    diskSizeGB,
    sku,
    hostEncryptionBlocked,
    adeExtensionStillPresent,
    encSettingsVersion,
    encryptionType
| order by vmName asc, diskName asc
content.title: Disks with encryptionSettingsCollection Flag — Cannot Enable Host Encryption

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| extend hasADEFlag = tobool(properties.encryptionSettingsCollection.enabled) == true
| extend managedBy = tostring(properties.managedBy)
| extend vmName = iff(isnotempty(managedBy), tostring(split(managedBy, '/')[8]), 'Unattached')
| summarize
    totalDisks = count(),
    flaggedDisks = countif(hasADEFlag),
    cleanDisks = countif(not(hasADEFlag))
    by bin(1,1)
| project
    ['Total Disks'] = totalDisks,
    ['🔴 ADE Flag Present (Blocked)'] = flaggedDisks,
    ['🟢 Clean (No Flag)'] = cleanDisks,
    ['Migration Progress %'] = round(100.0 * cleanDisks / totalDisks, 1)
content.title: ADE Flag Summary Across All Disks

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where '*' in~ ({ResourceGroups}) or resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroups})
| where tobool(properties.encryptionSettingsCollection.enabled) == true
| extend managedBy = tostring(properties.managedBy)
| extend vmName = iff(isnotempty(managedBy), tostring(split(managedBy, '/')[8]), 'Unattached')
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('AzureDiskEncryption', 'AzureDiskEncryptionForLinux')
    | extend vmId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | project vmId
) on $left.managedBy == $right.vmId
| extend status = case(
    isnotempty(vmId), 'ADE Extension Still Present',
    managedBy == '', 'Unattached Disk with Flag',
    'ADE Removed but Flag Remains'
)
| summarize Count = count() by status
| order by Count desc
content.title: Flagged Disks — Migration State Breakdown
